data.title: Ishidori Matsuri in Kuwana City, Mie, Japan, known as the Noisiest Festival, to be held on August 2nd and 3rd. UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage event. Strengthening internationalization efforts.
data.description: Kuwana City in Mie Prefecture, Japan, around 20 minutes away from Nagoya station by train, has intensified its internationalization initiatives and information sharing since last year to evolve into a globally inviting city. The renowned Kuwana Ishidori Matsuri, a UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage event, is scheduled for August 2nd and 3rd this year, at Kuwana Sosha (Kasuga Shrine). This UNESCO-acclaimed festival attracts a significant number of attendees each year, contributing to the city's goal of global openness.

data.title: CPSC warns to stop using Velazzio Thermo1 Battery Heated Gloves due to burn hazard; sold on Amazon.com.
data.description: The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued a warning on July 31, 2025, regarding the Velazzio Thermo1 Battery Heated Gloves. Consumers are advised to cease the use of these gloves promptly as they present a significant risk of injury. The gloves have exhibited the potential to overheat or create hotspots while in use, posing a danger to users. It is crucial for consumers to discontinue using these gloves to avoid any potential harm.

data.title: KNIPEX NA launches enhanced Cobra® ES, adding more functions and new 7 1/4" size for improved accessibility and capacity.
data.description: Introducing the KNIPEX Cobra® ES, a enhanced version of the original Cobra tool, featuring improved accessibility, increased capacity, and additional functions. With a new size of 7 1/4", this updated tool promises to provide even more benefits to tradesmen. Released on July 31, 2025, in BUFFALO GROVE, Illinois, the Cobra ES is designed to offer users an upgraded experience with its enhanced features.

data.title: Danny Lee appointed as Managing Director for Greater China at Monks, a digital brand of S4Capital plc. Effective immediately.
data.description: Shanghai, July 31, 2025 - Monks, a worldwide digital brand under S4Capital plc, has appointed Danny Lee as the Managing Director of Monks Greater China. Lee assumes the position with immediate effect and will collaborate closely in his new role.

data.title: BayCare Health System in Clearwater, Fla., receives 2025 Pharmacy Compounding Excellence Award from Premier Inc.
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida on July 31, 2025, BayCare Health System, a prominent not-for-profit academic health care system in West Central Florida, was honored with the prestigious 2025 Pharmacy Compounding Excellence Award by Premier, Inc., a top technology-driven healthcare organization. This recognition highlights BayCare's exceptional performance in the field of pharmacy compounding.

data.title: New EURAU stablecoin backed by Deutsche Bank launched, euro stablecoins are only 0.2% of market despite 60% growth since late 2024.
data.description: The new EURAU stablecoin by AllUnity has been introduced into the market. Currently, euro-denominated stablecoins only make up 0.2% of the stablecoin market. However, these stablecoins have seen a significant 60% increase since late 2024.
